VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: Full hardened mint e2e flow completed successfully: product created with CSRF header, minted to ACTIVE with synthetic on-chain data, resolved via GS1 Digital Link with 14-digit padded GTIN, JSON-LD with custom context and mapped status 'verified', GTIN check digit validation returns 400 for invalid, CSRF protection returns 403 without X-Galileo-Client header.

details.createProduct: success — POST /products with X-Galileo-Client:1 header and cookie auth returned 200. Product created with id=cmmbv1xad0004uv14mcneu0n0, status=DRAFT, gtin=0012345678905, serialNumber=MINT-E2E-001, did=did:galileo:01:00012345678905:21:MINT-E2E-001. Passport created with digitalLink using 14-digit padded GTIN.
details.mintProduct: success — POST /products/:id/mint with X-Galileo-Client:1 returned 200. Status changed to ACTIVE. Synthetic on-chain data populated: txHash=0x5670d1284bca386bae6d1a8615a4e4569bbea45c9753d5ee894fd2347f66c467, tokenAddress=0x31d2a3f68437d84b56d87902eb534e2dd9d4d245, chainId=84532, mintedAt=2026-03-04T09:55:16.897Z. MINTED event recorded.
details.resolveDigitalLink: success — GET /01/00012345678905/21/MINT-E2E-001 returned JSON-LD with: @type=IndividualProduct, @context with schema.org (@vocab), gs1 (https://ref.gs1.org/voc/), galileo (https://galileoprotocol.io/ns/) namespaces, galileo:status=verified (mapped from ACTIVE), gs1:gtin=00012345678905 (14-digit padded), galileo:digitalLink=https://id.galileoprotocol.io/01/00012345678905/21/MINT-E2E-001, galileo:did, galileo:passport with txHash/tokenAddress/chainId/mintedAt, galileo:brand with name and did.
details.gtinCheckDigitValidation: 400 returned — GET /01/00012345678999/21/FAKE returned HTTP 400 with {success:false, error:{code:VALIDATION_ERROR, message:Invalid GTIN check digit}}
details.csrfProtection: 403 returned — POST /products without X-Galileo-Client header returned HTTP 403 with {success:false, error:{code:CSRF_REQUIRED, message:X-Galileo-Client header required}}
